Defendant Archimedes Banya Sf Llc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Further Responses To Its First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rafael Crespo, Jr., Esq., Law Offices of Rafael Crespo, Jr., 415-285-2063, appearing for Plaintiff;
Vladie P. Viltman, Law Offices of Brain E. Soriano, 415-593-7333, appearing for Defendant(s) Archimeded Banya SF, L.L.C. et al;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as modifed.

The motion is granted and Plaintiff shall within 20 days do the following:

--produce all documents committed to be produced in the responses to the Request for Production of Documents;
--provide verifications to Plaintiff's responses to the Form Interrogatories, to the Special Interrogatories, and to the Requests for Production of Documents;
--provide full and complete responses to Special Interrogatories 2-4, 23,26-27,33, and
--provide a further response to Form Interrogatory 8.7.

For reasons set forth in CCP section 2023.010 (d) and (h), the motion for an award of monetary sanctions is granted in the amount $3000 against Plaintiff and Plaintiff's Counsel, Rafael Crespo.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Sandford Kingsley; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
